title: Crossword Bookstores is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Crossword Bookstores is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, Crossword Bookstores in Tiruchirappalli is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Crossword Bookstores:
Crossword Bookstores is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Crossword Bookstores!
